member.name: M:InventoryApi.Controllers.InventoryController.Upload(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Uploads inventory items from a CSV file. The CSV should have the following columns: Name, Category, Price, Quantity. The API will process the file and return the total number of records processed along with any errors encountered during processing.

member.name: M:InventoryApi.Controllers.InventoryController.Get(System.Int32,System.Int32,InventoryFilter)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of inventory items with optional filters
member.param: Number of records per page (default is 5)

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
